title: Cobblemon Paintings (Resource Pack)
description: Custom Pokémon-themed paintings. Perfect for a Cobblemon playthrough.
body:
Just a collection of my custom, Pokémon-themed paintings. Perfect for a Cobblemon playthrough. That's it... Hope you enjoy!

Pair it with the data pack here: [Cobblemon Paintings (Data Pack)](https://modrinth.com/datapack/cobblemon-paintings-dp)

I welcome any feedback or suggestions!
